description: Toolchain-fail fixture. Simulates scripts/run-gitleaks.mjs exiting with the documented SECURITY TOOLCHAIN NOT READY path (in this fixture's case: PLATFORM_UNSUPPORTED because the recorded SHA-256 in scripts/tool-checksums.json does not match the configured host platform). When the verifier cannot run the gitleaks step deterministically, the validator reports SECURITY NOT READY: TOOLCHAIN_FAIL exit 1. All other scripts (audit, sbom, licenses) can still execute in isolation so the failure is precisely pinned to the toolchain path, not a transitive source policy failure.

toolchain.diagnostic: no asset recorded for freebsd-x64 in scripts/tool-checksums.json
